title: Epigenomics and transcriptomics association study of blood pressure and incident diagnosis of hypertension in twins.
author: Skovgaard AC Nejad AM Beck HC Tan Q Soerensen M
content: S-EPMC11972964 PMC11972964 Epigenomics and transcriptomics association study of blood pressure and incident diagnosis of hypertension in twins. Hypertension is the most frequent health-related condition worldwide and is a primary risk factor for renal and cardiovascular diseases. However
